scripts.build: bun run build:js && bun run build:native
scripts.build:native:dev: node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('./generated', { recursive: true, force: true })" && bunx @napi-rs/cli build --platform --manifest-path ../eclipsa/compiler/rust/Cargo.toml --package-json-path ./package.json --target-dir ../eclipsa/compiler/rust/target --output-dir ./generated --js-package-name @eclipsa/optimizer && bun ./scripts/sync-browser-wasm.ts
scripts.build:native: node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('./generated', { recursive: true, force: true })" && bunx @napi-rs/cli build --platform --release --manifest-path ../eclipsa/compiler/rust/Cargo.toml --package-json-path ./package.json --target-dir ../eclipsa/compiler/rust/target --output-dir ./generated --js-package-name @eclipsa/optimizer && bun ./scripts/sync-browser-wasm.ts
scripts.create:npm-dirs: node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('./npm', { recursive: true, force: true })" && bunx @napi-rs/cli create-npm-dirs --package-json-path ./package.json --npm-dir ./npm
